title: Zoom Punch
fact: Jonathan can dislocate the joints in his arm to extend his physical reach, immediately using Hamon energy to dull the pain and heal the structural displacement.

title: Scarlet Ripple
fact: The Scarlet Ripple is a Hamon technique that allows Jonathan to channel solar energy through solid weapons or environments, heating them up to ignite flammable targets on contact.

title: Ripple Cutter
fact: Will A. Zeppeli can spit ordinary wine infused with concentrated Hamon energy, transforming the liquid into high-velocity, razor-sharp blades that slice through objects.

title: Hamon Diaphragm Breathing
fact: Hamon production relies entirely on a precise breathing pattern controlled by the diaphragm, which increases oxygen in the blood to produce energy matching the frequency of the sun.

title: Bladed Bowler Hat
fact: During his time as an Ogre Street thug, Speedwagon wielded a bowler hat with hidden, razor-sharp blades lined along the brim, throwing it like a deadly projectile.

title: The Speedwagon Foundation
fact: After striking it rich in the American oil industry, Speedwagon established an international foundation dedicated to medical research, environmental protection, and assisting the Joestar family.

title: Thunder Cross Split Attack
fact: Dire's signature technique crosses his arms to form a fluid defense against counters while keeping his lower body open to deliver a direct, Hamon-infused strike to the opponent's face.

title: Hamon-Infused Scarf
fact: Straizo wears a custom scarf woven from hundreds of thousands of individual moth silk threads, which conducts Hamon flawlessly and can redirect incoming physical projectiles.

title: Narrow Window Breakthrough
fact: Poco overcomes his natural cowardice to crawl through a narrow window into a room filled with hostile vampires, successfully unlocking the main door to save Jonathan's party.

title: The Sword of Pluck
fact: After being defeated in noble combat, the undead knight Bruford gifts his broadsword to Jonathan, renaming the weapon 'Pluck' to honor Jonathan's pure spirit.

title: Clacker Volley
fact: Joseph charges ordinary plastic clacker toys with Hamon energy, spinning them at high speeds to create an unpredictable and dangerous blunt ranged weapon.

title: Hamon Hair Barrier
fact: By ripping out strands of his own hair and charging them with Hamon, Joseph can create a dense, rigid floating web capable of blocking automatic gunfire from Santana.

title: Psychological Prediction
fact: Joseph uses his extreme psychological insight to predict his opponent's exact next phrase, stating 'Next you'll say...' to completely shatter their tactical composure.

title: Bubble Cutter
fact: Caesar infuses his soap bubbles with high-velocity spinning energy, flattening their shape into spinning, saucer-like blades that slice through objects on impact.

title: Bubble Lenses
fact: Caesar can suspend hundreds of stationary Hamon-infused bubbles in mid-air to act as lenses, refracting and focusing ambient sunlight into concentrated, lethal lasers.

title: Snake Muffler
fact: Lisa Lisa wears a custom muffler made of 100% pure Saturniidae silk, which conducts Hamon so efficiently that she can use it to stand on water or deflect blades.

title: Guardian of Aja
fact: Lisa Lisa operates as the highly skilled Hamon Master in charge of protecting the Red Stone of Aja on Air Supplena Island, preventing the Pillar Men from achieving perfection.

title: The Strategic Retreat
fact: Smokey Brown is the very first person to witness Joseph Joestar's ultimate secret technique: running away from a superior opponent to buy time for a new plan.

title: Mayoral Election
fact: Deeply inspired by his experiences with the Joestars, Smokey studies political science after the events of Part 2 and eventually becomes the first Black mayor of Georgia.

title: Ultraviolet Eye Laser
fact: After being rebuilt into a high-tech cyborg, Stroheim receives a mechanical eye modification capable of tracking targets and firing a concentrated beam of ultraviolet light.

title: Abdominal Machine Gun
fact: Stroheim features a military-grade machine gun built directly into his cybernetic torso cavity, which is capable of firing up to 600 heavy armor-piercing rounds per minute.

title: Air Supplena Attendant
fact: Suzi Q works closely alongside Lisa Lisa as her personal maid and assistant in Venice, completely unaware of the supernatural Hamon properties surrounding her until later events.

title: The Crimson Blood Bubble
fact: In his final moments, Caesar uses the absolute last of his life force to form a blood-red bubble containing his bandanna and Wamuu's antidote ring for Joseph.

title: Bullet Catch Precision
fact: Jotaro demonstrates Star Platinum's extreme speed and hyper-precision early on by catching a live bullet fired point-blank at his head inside his jail cell.

title: Microscopic Photographic Sight
fact: Jotaro commands Star Platinum to identify a microscopic fly captured in a pitch-black photograph, allowing the group to pinpoint DIO's location in Cairo, Egypt.

title: Star Finger
fact: Star Platinum can concentrate its energy into its index and middle fingers, stretching them out suddenly to deliver a surprise piercing attack at medium range.

title: Anatomical Possession
fact: Kakyoin can completely unravel Hierophant Green into an elastic, string-like state, sliding it inside a human host to control their physical movements from within.

title: Hierophant's Web Barrier
fact: Hierophant Green can extend its unraveled body into a web of near-invisible, microscopic tripwire strings across a large area, automatically triggering an Emerald Splash if touched.

title: Crossfire Hurricane
fact: Avdol's signature technique fires massive, multi-directional ankh-shaped constructs made of pure fire from Magician's Red, which can split apart or change course mid-flight.

title: Red Bind
fact: Avdol can shape the intense heat of Magician's Red into thick, binding ropes of pure fire that tightly pin an opponent down without instantly causing fatal burns.

title: Armor Shedding Speed boost
fact: Silver Chariot can completely cast off its heavy, protective silver armor, drastically increasing its movement speed to create a series of realistic physical afterimages.

title: Rapier Blade Projectile
fact: Polnareff can fire the physical rapier blade of Silver Chariot like a high-velocity projectile, though he rarely uses this trick since it leaves him temporarily weaponless.

title: The Fool's Sand Clone
fact: Iggy uses his shape-shifting sand Stand, The Fool, to build a perfect, fully colored physical replica of people or other Stands to manipulate and trick opponents.

title: Coffee Chewing Gum Bribe
fact: Iggy is an incredibly stubborn, wild Boston Terrier who fiercely values his independence and can generally only be bribed or pacated using coffee-flavored chewing gum.

title: The Stowaway Companion
fact: Anne is the name given in official materials to the runaway girl who sneaks aboard the Joestar group's cargo ship in Hong Kong, journeying with them across several countries.

title: Spirit Photography Map Transmutation
fact: Joseph can manifest Hermit Purple through ordinary electronic devices, breaking film cameras or using television sets to instantly synthesize real-time geographic maps and information.

title: Time Stop Awakening
fact: During his final clash against DIO, Jotaro realizes that Star Platinum possesses the exact same strength and molecular speed as The World, awakening the ability to stop time.

title: The 20-Meter Emerald Splash
fact: Kakyoin traps DIO inside a vast, interlocking multi-directional web of invisible Hierophant strings, triggering an automated, simultaneous emerald barrage from all angles.

title: Crazy Diamond's Restitution Limit
fact: Josuke's Stand can perfectly fix broken structures and heal lethal physical wounds instantly, but it is completely incapable of reviving dead organisms or curing illnesses.

title: Permanent Matter Fusion
fact: If Josuke restores a broken object while another matter source is mixed in, he can permanently fuse them together, such as trapping the villain Angelo inside a solid stone boulder.

title: Hair Insult Rage Boost
fact: Josuke flies into an absolute, blind psychological rage whenever anyone insults his pompadour hairstyle, completely bypassing rational thought to maximize Crazy Diamond's speed.

title: Echoes ACT1 Sound Words
fact: Echoes ACT1 can embed large physical katakana words directly onto an object or target, forcing them to hear that specific sound effect on a loud, endless cognitive loop.

title: Echoes ACT2 Visual Sound Effects
fact: Echoes ACT2 transforms its tail tip into a physical word; when touched, the onomatopoeia manifests its actual physical property, such as 'sizzle' producing intense heat.

title: Echoes ACT3 Three Freeze
fact: Echoes ACT3 gains a sentient persona and applies crushing gravitational pressure to a single target within a strict 5-meter radius, rendering them immobile.

title: The Hand's Space Erasure
fact: Okuyasu's Stand can completely erase whatever physical space or matter it scrapes with its right palm, completely removing it from existence as the universe snaps shut to fill the void.

title: Spatial Vacuum Teleportation
fact: By erasing the empty air in front of him, Okuyasu creates a sudden spatial vacuum that instantly teleports distant objects, environments, or opponents directly into his melee strike zone.

title: Inkless Manga Drawing
fact: Rohan possesses such supernatural artistic hand-speed and precision that he can draw flawless, high-quality manga pages by splashing raw ink drops onto a page with his bare fingers.

title: Heaven's Door Direct Write
fact: Rohan transforms a target's body parts into pages of an open book, allowing him to view their complete history and insert binding written commands they are physically forced to obey.

title: Love Deluxe Range Control
fact: Yukako's Stand, Love Deluxe, integrates directly into her hair, allowing her to extend its length indefinitely and manipulate it with enough physical strength to lift vehicles.

title: White Hair Transformation
fact: The extreme psychological stress and emotional heartbreak Yukako experiences during her intense battle against Koichi causes her long dark hair to turn completely white.

title: Stress Invisibility
fact: Shizuka is a standalone infant whose Stand, Achtung Baby, turns her entirely invisible whenever she feels frightened or stressed, extending the invisibility to nearby objects.

title: Pinky Finger Wager
fact: Rohan becomes so consumed by suspicion that Josuke is cheating during a casual dice game that he uses a knife to stab his own pinky finger to wager his entire home on uncovering the truth.

title: Choosing to Return
fact: After falling into a fatal, near-death state from Killer Queen's explosive bubbles, Okuyasu encounters his late brother Keicho in a dream and consciously chooses to return to the living world.

title: Gold Experience Damage Reflection
fact: Giorno can transform ordinary inanimate objects into living plants or animals; early on, any physical damage or force directed at these creations is fully reflected back onto the attacker.

title: Cognitive Sensory Acceleration
fact: A direct physical strike from Gold Experience floods a living opponent with pure life energy, causing their mental senses to accelerate wildly out of control while their body remains in slow motion.

title: Anatomical Organ Replication
fact: Giorno discovers he can transform tiny inanimate fragments like buttons or bullet casings into perfect, functioning replicas of human flesh, bone, and organs to heal fatal wounds.

title: Liar Sweat Taste Test
fact: Bucciarati claims he can accurately deduce if an individual is lying by licking the sweat directly off their skin, noting that a liar's sweat has a distinctly salty taste.

title: Spatial Zipper Travel
fact: Sticky Fingers can create fully functional, openable zippers on any solid surface, allowing Bucciarati to slice open spatial paths through solid walls or split his own limbs to avoid attacks.

title: The Sex Pistols Bullet Redirect
fact: Mista's Stand, Sex Pistols, consists of six tiny, sentient numbered entities that ride, catch, kick, and redirect his revolver's bullets mid-flight to hit targets from impossible angles.

title: Tetraphobia Number Skip
fact: Mista suffers from severe, superstitious tetraphobia. Because of his intense fear of the number four, his Stand completely skips the digit, naming the individual entities 1 through 7 with no Number 4.

title: Carbon Dioxide Breath Radar
fact: Narancia utilizes a radar eyepiece linked to Aerosmith that tracks and isolates targets solely by detecting the exact amounts of carbon dioxide they exhale into the air.

title: Aerosmith Toy Scaling
fact: Narancia's Stand takes the physical shape of a miniature toy-sized fighter plane, but it comes equipped with fully operational, infinite machine guns and a high-powered bomb.

title: Moody Blues Chronological Playback
fact: Moody Blues can perfectly replicate and replay past events or individuals in a specific location at an exact time, though it is entirely vulnerable to attacks while locked in playback mode.

title: Post-Mortem Stone Impression
fact: In the seconds following a fatal strike from Diavolo, Abbacchio uses Moody Blues' remaining power to imprint the Boss's true facial structure and fingerprints onto a stone monument.

title: Purple Haze Capsule Virus
fact: Fugo's highly volatile Stand, Purple Haze, features three distinct glass capsules on its knuckles that shatter to release a flesh-eating virus, melting living cells within seconds.

title: Virus Light Vulnerability
fact: The deadly viral strain engineered by Purple Haze is intensely sensitive to ambient light, completely breaking down and neutralizing after just a few seconds of exposure to sunlight.

title: Spice Girl Elasticity
fact: Trish's Stand, Spice Girl, possesses a distinct sentient personality and allows Trish to soften any solid structure into a rubbery, indestructible elastic state.

title: Elastic Safety Net
fact: Trish can soften the physical ground beneath her to safely cushion a high fall, turning solid concrete floors into a bounceable safety net to protect her group.

title: Gold Experience Requiem
fact: By piercing his Stand with the Beetle Arrow, Giorno awakens Gold Experience Requiem, an omnipotent Stand capable of resetting any hostile action or willpower back to zero.

title: The Living Corpse Phenomenon
fact: Bucciarati is technically killed by Diavolo early on in Venice, but his physical form continues to fight as a walking corpse because Giorno flooded his cell structure with pure life energy.

title: Stone Free Decomposition Range
fact: Jolyne can unravel up to 70% of her physical body into a flexible string structure, though extending the string too far from her core drastically weakens her defenses.

title: Surgical String Sewing
fact: Jolyne can utilize the unraveled thread of Stone Free to stitch together open flesh wounds and lacerations received during combat, allowing her to survive massive physical trauma.

title: Kiss Duplicate Stickers
fact: Ermes places custom lip-patterned stickers onto items to produce an identical duplicate; removing the sticker causes the copy to snap back into the original, causing structural damage.

title: Sticker Separation Harm
fact: Ermes can place a sticker onto her own limbs to split them into duplicates, using the sudden kinetic force of the objects merging back together to deal high-velocity blunt damage.

title: Plankton Body Structure
fact: Foo Fighters is a unique sentient entity composed entirely of a massive colony of microscopic plankton organisms that took over the physical corpse of an inmate named Atloe.

title: Hydration Dependency
fact: Foo Fighters relies heavily on constant fluid consumption to keep its plankton cells functioning, becoming severely weakened and losing its physical structure if dehydrated.

title: Poisonous Frog Rain
fact: By manipulating atmospheric pressure and wind currents, Weather Report can pick up thousands of poisonous dart frogs from distant ecosystems and rain them down over the prison.

title: Pressurized Air Suit
fact: Weather Report can form a highly localized layer of concentrated ozone and air currents to wrap a protective, pressurized spacesuit around himself and allies to survive toxic vacuums.

title: Heavy Weather Snail Manipulation
fact: When his sealed memories return, Weather Report activates Heavy Weather, a power that alters atmospheric light rays to subliminally trick anyone who looks at them into turning into snails.

title: Diver Down Phasing
fact: Anasui commands Diver Down to phase directly inside solid structures or human bodies, allowing him to easily restructure internal mechanics or absorb incoming damage from the inside.

title: Trapped Kinetic Impact
fact: Anasui can strike a surface and store the entire kinetic force of the punch inside the object, releasing the stored impact outward only when an opponent steps over the spot.

title: Ghost Room Objects
fact: Emporio interacts with the 'ghosts' of objects that were burned down in the prison's past, allowing him to use fully operational ghost computers, reference books, and food items.

title: Mobius Strip Inversion Counter
fact: Jolyne counters the gravity-flipping inversion strikes of C-Moon by unraveling sections of her own torso into a continuous Mobius strip, rendering her structure completely immune to turning inside out.

title: Fingernail Bullet Spin
fact: Johnny applies the basic fundamentals of the Spin technique to make his fingernails rotate at extreme speeds like circular saws, allowing him to fire them off as high-velocity bullets.

title: Herbal Tea nail Regeneration
fact: Johnny drinks a specialized herbal tea brewed by Gyro Zeppeli that accelerates his nail cell division, allowing him to instantly regrow fired fingernail bullets during the race.

title: Tusk ACT2 Moving Holes
fact: By enhancing his Spin via the Golden Rectangle, Johnny creates rotational bullet holes that can physically move across flat surfaces to relentlessly track down fleeing targets.

title: Tusk ACT4 Infinite Rotation
fact: Johnny utilizes a horse's natural running gallop to produce the multi-dimensional Infinite Rotation, unlocking Tusk ACT4 to permanently bypass any spatial or physical defense.

title: Steel Ball Nerve Relaxation
fact: Gyro throws weighted steel spheres infused with the Spin technique to send high-frequency vibrations into an opponent's nervous system, temporarily distorting or paralyzing their muscle tissue.

title: Scan weak point Detection
fact: Gyro obtains a Holy Corpse part that embeds a mechanical eye into his steel balls, granting him the 'Scan' ability to see directly through solid matter and calculate structural weak points.

title: Ball Breaker Breakthrough
fact: Gyro achieves the ultimate form of the Zeppeli family rotation to manifest Ball Breaker, a Stand capable of passing through dimensional barriers to rapidly age a target's cells upon physical contact.

title: Ticket to Ride Tear Blades
fact: Lucy develops a defensive Stand from a Holy Corpse part that transforms her tears into razor-sharp, physical blades capable of slicing objects or deflecting incoming physical harm.

title: Oh! Lonesome Me Rope Dismantling
fact: Mountain Tim can split his physical body cleanly along the exact path of a rope he is holding, allowing him to slide his separated parts along the line to travel safely across gaps.

title: Cream Starter Flesh Spray
fact: Hot Pants wields a compact, aerosol spray-can Stand that melts organic tissue into a portable foam, which can be sprayed onto wounds to heal them or used to block an enemy's airways.

title: Soft & Wet Property Plunder
fact: Josuke launches soap bubbles that physically steal a specific property from a target, such as instantly stripping away a floor's traction, a lightbulb's illumination, or a person's eyesight.

title: Biological Chimera Nature
fact: Josuke is a unique biological fusion of two separate people, Josefumi Kujo and Yoshikage Kira, resulting in a dual set of irises, lungs, and distinct overlapping birthmarks.

title: Soft & Wet: Go Beyond
fact: Josuke discovers that his bubbles are actually spinning lines of infinite thinness; because they technically do not exist in the physical world, they can bypass all universal logic and barriers.

title: Paisley Park Electronic Guidance
fact: Yasuho's Stand interfaces directly with digital networks, smartphones, and security systems to guide her along the absolute safest and most efficient path to any destination.

title: Doggy Style Ribbon Anatomy
fact: Rai can peel his own body structure into flat, continuous ribbons that retain full sensory feeling and physical strength, allowing him to squeeze into tiny gaps or extend his melee range.

title: King Nothing Origami Tracking
fact: Norisuke's puzzle-like Stand locks onto a target's specific scent, tracking their movement across any terrain and physically reconstructing their shape to show past actions.

title: November Rain Dense Water
fact: Jodio commands a large, multi-legged Stand that rains down localized water droplets with extreme physical mass, heavy enough to crush structural elements and pin targets to the ground.

title: Smooth Operators Slide Relocation
fact: Dragona utilizes a colony of tiny, wheeled Stands that slide and alter properties on a surface, such as moving a car's license plate or physically shifting a wound away from a vital organ.

title: The Hustle Muscular Grip
fact: Paco commands a Stand with no physical form that allows him to control his muscles independently, enabling him to grab items or scale sheer vertical walls using any section of his skin.

title: The Matte Kudasai Object Mirror
fact: Usagi's Stand can transform into any object he desires, but it has a strict rule: the transformation can only occur if another independent person explicitly requests the object from him first.

title: Bigmouth Strikes Again Camouflage
fact: Charmingman uses his Stand to manipulate his skin into thousands of tiny, mirror-like sand particles, allowing him to blend seamlessly into his surroundings as near-perfect camouflage.
